title: Support-Aware Exact-State Memory for Deep Q-Learning: Reproducibility Artifact
description: Code, exact-step results, independent DQN validation, confirmatory task expansion, support-abstention replication, extended MiniGrid diagnostics, and integrity audits for a reproducible boundary analysis of tabular-neural Q-learning gates.

creators.name: Erkalkan, Ercan
creators.affiliation: Vocational School of Technical Sciences, Department of Electronics and Automation, Artificial Intelligence Operator Program, Marmara University
